L1-01.why: Ăn uống là tình huống giao tiếp xảy ra hàng ngày khi du lịch, làm việc với khách nước ngoài, hoặc đi nhà hàng. Không biết gọi món = bỏ lỡ trải nghiệm.
L1-01.scene: Nhà hàng, quán ăn, du lịch trong và ngoài nước, đi cùng gia đình/bạn bè, tiệc công việc, fast food/casual/fine dining.

before: Can we see the menu, please?
We'd like a table for two.
Có món gì gợi ý không?
during: Could I have some water, please?
Can you make it less spicy?
after: Can we have the bill, please?
Thanh toán thẻ/tiền mặt được không?

real_english: Can I have → Can I get

dialogues.title: Gọi món cơ bản
lines: Can we see the menu, please?
I'd like the grilled salmon, please.
How would you like it cooked?

L1-01.shadow_script: Can we see the menu, please? I'd like to order. Could I have some water, please? This is delicious. Can we have the bill, please? Thank you so much.
missions: Dùng 1 cụm từ trong bữa ăn thật hôm nay
Order 1 món bằng tiếng Anh tại quán
Hỏi recommend món bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you ask for the menu?
What do you say when the food is too salty?
How do you ask for the bill?

sections.title: Tip về tipping
sections.text: Ở Mỹ và Canada, tip 15-20% là chuẩn. Ở Anh, 10-12.5%. Châu Âu thường gồm sẵn trong bill.

sections.title: Native conversation: At a restaurant
sections.caption: Xem ×3 lần — focus vào intonation, không subtitle

sections.title: 5 lưu ý khi gọi món
items: "Could I have..." lịch sự hơn "Give me..."
Native speakers nói "I'll have" thay vì "I want"
Pronounce "the" trước nguyên âm là "thee": the apple → thee apple
Khi nhân viên hỏi "Anything else?" → trả lời "That's all, thanks"
Sau khi ăn xong, nói "Could we get the check?" hoặc "Bill, please"

sections.title: Quick test
sections.question: Bạn muốn yêu cầu bớt cay món ăn — câu nào tự nhiên nhất?
options: A. Don't put much spice in the food
B. Can you make it less spicy?
sections.answer: B — "Can you make it less spicy?" · Đây là cách natural nhất. A nghe ra lệnh, C ngắn cộc.

sections.title: Practice with AI for 5 minutes
sections.prompt: You're a waiter at an upscale restaurant. I'm a customer who speaks English as a second language. Greet me, take my order, ask follow-up questions naturally. Use the phrases a real native speaker would. After we finish, tell me 3 things I could say more naturally.

sections.title: Real-life missions tuần này
items: Order 1 món bằng tiếng Anh tại quán Việt có tiếng Anh menu
Hỏi recommend món bằng tiếng Anh
Phàn nàn 1 lần nhỏ (quá mặn, hết món) bằng tiếng Anh lịch sự
Pay bill bằng tiếng Anh + tip

sections.text: If you talk to a man in a language he understands, that goes to his head. If you talk to him in his language, that goes to his heart.
sections.author: Nelson Mandela

L1-02.why: Lạc đường ở nước ngoài là tình huống stress nhất. Hỏi đường = bước cứu nguy số 1.
L1-02.scene: Du lịch, đường phố, taxi, metro station, lúc lạc đường, hỏi địa điểm.

before: Excuse me, could you help me?
Xin lỗi, anh/chị giúp được không?
Anh có biết ... ở đâu không?
after: Thank you so much for your help.

real_english: It's far → It's a bit far

dialogues.title: Hỏi đường tới khách sạn
lines: Excuse me, how do I get to Hilton Hotel?
Go straight for two blocks, then turn left.

L1-02.shadow_script: Excuse me, could you help me? How do I get to the station? Is it far from here? Thank you so much.
missions: Hỏi đường đến 1 địa điểm bằng tiếng Anh
Cho người khác chỉ đường bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you politely ask for directions?
How do you say you're lost?

L1-03.why: Mua sắm là tình huống có TIỀN — không hiểu = bị tính sai giá, không thương lượng được.
L1-03.scene: Shopping mall, chợ, online shopping, return/exchange.

before: Do you have this in another size?
after: Can I return this if it doesn't fit?
Trả lại được không nếu không vừa?

dialogues.title: Mua quần áo
lines: Of course, the fitting room is over there.

L1-03.shadow_script: How much is this? Can I try it on? I'll take it. Can I have a receipt?
missions: Hỏi giá 1 món tại shop bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you ask the price?
How do you ask to try on clothes?

L1-06.why: Sân bay là nơi tiếng Anh là LANGUAGE OF DEFAULT. Sai 1 từ = miss flight.
L1-06.scene: Check-in, security, gate, immigration, customs, baggage claim.

before: I'd like to check in, please.
I have one bag to check.
Can I have a window/aisle seat?
after: Where can I get a taxi?

dialogues.title: Check-in counter
lines: Hi, I'd like to check in for flight VN123.
Here you go. Could I get a window seat?

L1-06.shadow_script: I'd like to check in. I have one bag. Window seat please. Where's gate B12?
missions: Check-in bằng tiếng Anh next flight
active_recall: How do you ask for a window seat?
How do you ask about flight status?

L1-08.why: Hotel check-in/check-out là test nhanh kỹ năng giao tiếp. Wrong room = wrong vacation.
L1-08.scene: Reception, room service, check-in, check-out, complaint.

before: I'd like to check in, please.
during: Could I have an extra towel?
after: I'd like to check out, please.
Could you call me a taxi?
Gọi taxi giúp tôi được không?

dialogues.title: Check-in
lines: Hi, I have a reservation under Truong.
Welcome! Let me see... yes, you're in room 408.

L1-08.shadow_script: I have a reservation. I'd like to check in. What time is breakfast? Could I have an extra towel?
missions: Order room service bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you check in?
How do you ask about breakfast time?

L1-04.shadow_script: Hi, I'm Duong. Nice to meet you. Where are you from?
missions: Giới thiệu bản thân bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you introduce yourself?

L1-05.why: Numbers/time = không hiểu = không biết giá, lịch hẹn.
L1-05.shadow_script: What time is it? It's three thirty. How much? Twenty dollars.
missions: Dùng số tiếng Anh khi mua đồ
active_recall: How do you ask for the time?

L1-07.why: Đi xe buýt/metro = di chuyển rẻ nhất ở nước ngoài.
L1-07.shadow_script: Does this bus go to downtown? One ticket to the airport, please.
active_recall: How do you ask if a bus goes somewhere?

L1-09.why: Gọi điện = tình huống không thấy mặt = cần rõ ràng nhất.
L1-09.shadow_script: Hello, this is Duong. Can I speak to John? I'd like to book a table.
active_recall: How do you start a phone call?

L1-10.why: Sức khỏe = không nói được = nguy hiểm.
L1-10.shadow_script: I don't feel well. I have a headache and a fever.
missions: Mô tả 1 triệu chứng bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you describe pain?

L1-11.why: Xin help = social skill cơ bản nhất.

during: Excuse me, could you help me?
Xin lỗi giúp tôi được không?

L1-11.shadow_script: Excuse me, could you help me? I'm sorry to bother you. Thank you so much.
active_recall: How do you politely ask for help?

L1-12.why: Khẩn cấp = vài giây quyết định sống chết.
L1-12.shadow_script: Help! Call the police! I need a doctor. Where's the hospital?
active_recall: What do you say in an emergency?

L2-01.why: Small talk = khóa mở mọi mối quan hệ phương Tây.

during: Did you have a good weekend?

L2-01.shadow_script: How's your day going? Did you have a good weekend? The weather is nice today.
missions: Small talk với 1 native speaker 3 phút
active_recall: What's a good small talk question?

L2-02.shadow_script: I work as a coach. I'm originally from Vietnam. In my free time, I read and run.
active_recall: How do you introduce yourself professionally?

L2-03.why: Career talk = mở cửa job opportunities.

during: What do you do for a living?
I've been doing it for ... years.

L2-03.shadow_script: What do you do for a living? I'm in the coaching industry. I've been doing it for 5 years.
active_recall: How do you describe your job?

L2-04.why: Plans = social currency. Không plan = không kết nối.
L2-04.shadow_script: Are you free on Friday? Would you like to grab coffee? How about 3 PM?
missions: Lên kế hoạch với 1 người bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you invite someone?

L2-05.shadow_script: I think this is a good idea. In my opinion, we should try it. I disagree because of cost.
active_recall: How do you start an opinion?

during: How do you know the host?

L2-06.shadow_script: Cheers! How do you know the host? The food is great here.
active_recall: What do you say at a party?

during: Where did you go on vacation?

L2-07.shadow_script: Where did you go on vacation? I've always wanted to visit Japan.
missions: Kể 1 chuyến đi bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you ask about travel?

L2-08.why: Food culture = entry to deep conversation.

during: This is a popular dish in my country.
Đây là món phổ biến ở nước tôi

L2-08.shadow_script: Have you ever tried pho? This is a popular dish in Vietnam.
active_recall: How do you describe a dish?

L2-09.shadow_script: I love your outfit. You did a great job. Thanks, that means a lot.
active_recall: How do you accept a compliment?

L2-10.why: Conflict = test thật của EQ + ngôn ngữ.

during: I see where you're coming from.
Tôi không đồng ý nhưng tôn trọng

L2-10.shadow_script: I see where you're coming from. I respectfully disagree. Let's find a middle ground.
missions: Bất đồng quan điểm 1 lần bằng tiếng Anh
active_recall: How do you disagree politely?

L3-01.shadow_script: Let me walk you through this. The key takeaway is X. Any questions?
active_recall: How do you start a presentation?

during: I was hoping we could discuss ...
Tôi mong chúng ta bàn về ...

L3-02.shadow_script: I was hoping we could discuss the price. What's your bottom line? Let's meet in the middle.
active_recall: How do you start a negotiation?

during: Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
5 năm nữa bạn thấy mình ở đâu?

L3-03.shadow_script: Tell me about yourself. My greatest strength is X. In 5 years I see myself...
active_recall: How do you answer 'tell me about yourself'?

L3-04.shadow_script: Could we circle back to the budget? I'd like to add something. Let's table this for now.
active_recall: How do you contribute in a meeting?

during: Đây là chuyện đã xảy ra...

L3-05.shadow_script: So here's what happened. The funny thing is, I didn't know. Long story short, it worked out.
active_recall: How do you start a story?

L3-06.shadow_script: That's a fair point, however the data suggests otherwise. Let me play devil's advocate.
active_recall: How do you counter an argument politely?

during: I can see this is important to you.
Tôi thấy điều này quan trọng với anh
How are you feeling about this?

L3-07.shadow_script: I can see this is important to you. How are you feeling? I appreciate your honesty.
active_recall: How do you show empathy verbally?

during: I look forward to your response.

L3-08.shadow_script: I'm writing to inquire about the position. Please find attached my resume. I look forward to your response.
active_recall: How do you close a formal email?

L3-09.shadow_script: No way! You're kidding! That's a good one.
active_recall: How do you react to a joke?

L3-10.why: Thinking in English = phản xạ tự nhiên cao nhất.
L3-10.shadow_script: What if I tried this? I should probably check it. Let me think about it.
missions: Suy nghĩ 5 phút bằng tiếng Anh mỗi ngày
active_recall: What internal phrases do you use?
